name: HSBC Bermuda
description: HSBC's Bermuda operation, offering personal and business banking. A common choice for international hires from the US and UK who already have HSBC relationships elsewhere. Note: HSBC Bermuda is legally a separate entity from HSBC UK/US — accounts are not automatically linked. Personal banking, mortgages, and investment services available. Account opening timeline: 2–4 weeks with required documentation (work permit, employer letter, ID, proof of address).
